body.content:
{"title":"Daily AI Info (1/2)","elements":[[{"tag":"text","text":"News"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"要闻"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"1. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Anthropic 剥离 Claude 程序化调用额度并临时放宽 Claude Code 限额"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Anthropic 宣布 Claude Code 每周限额即日起临时上调 50% 直至 7月13日 。同时，自 6月15日 起， Claude 付费套餐的程序化调用将独立计算，改用 20 到 200美元 不等的专属月度credit，涵盖 Agent SDK 等工具，耗尽后需按API费率计费。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://x.com/ClaudeDevs/status/2054639777685934564","text":"https://x.com/ClaudeDevs/status/2054639777685934564"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"模型发布"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"2. "},{"tag":"text","text":"小米开源 OneVL 自动驾驶框架"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
小米 具身智能团队开源自动驾驶 VLA 框架 OneVL 。官方称，该模型通过双辅助解码器压缩推理，是首个在四个基准测试中准确率超越显式 CoT 的隐式 CoT 模型。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://github.com/xiaomi-research/onevl","text":"https://github.com/xiaomi-research/onevl"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"开发生态"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"3. "},{"tag":"text","text":"MiniMax 合并订阅套餐，上线 Agent Teams 功能"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
MiniMax 宣布将 Agent 升级为 Mavis ，新增 Agent Teams 功能支持多 Agent 并行协作，并合并 TokenPlan 与 Agent Plan 实现统一订阅。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/TIL7o92f71DsPPLWT4_37A","text":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/TIL7o92f71DsPPLWT4_37A"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"4. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenAI 推出 Codex 企业版限时促销，新用户免费用两月"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
OpenAI 面向企业推出限时促销，符合条件的企业在未来 30 天内接入，其纯新增用户可获得两个月的 Codex 免费使用权。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://openai.com/form/codex-enterprise-promo/","text":"https://openai.com/form/codex-enterprise-promo/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"5. "},{"tag":"text","text":"支付宝联合扣子编程上线商家入驻与支付集成 Skill"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
支付宝联合 扣子 编程上线全新支付与商家入驻 Skill 。开发者现可通过自然语言一站式开发应用、集成收款并完成商家入驻。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/kE8Wjp7VOhaDvVHwnjrcNw","text":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/kE8Wjp7VOhaDvVHwnjrcNw"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"产品应用"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"6. "},{"tag":"text","text":"腾讯宣布微信已支持将聊天记录一键转发至元宝"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
腾讯 宣布 微信 已支持将聊天记录一键转发至 元宝 进行总结或构思回复，该功能以不保存记录的临时对话进行，需将相关应用升级至最新版。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/t9yvIdiuyT_bjE5Ix9rTzA","text":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/t9yvIdiuyT_bjE5Ix9rTzA"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"7. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Notion 开放 Agent 编排与自定义工具"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Notion 发布开发者平台，推出 External Agents API 让任意外部 Agent 可在 Notion 内协作、被编排与监控，并开放 Workers 运行时用于构建自定义工具。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://www.notion.com/product/dev","text":"https://www.notion.com/product/dev"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"8. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Runway 推出对话式视频生成工具 Runway Agent"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Runway 正式推出 Runway Agent 。用户仅需通过对话描述需求，该 Agent 即可生成包含多场景与配乐的高清视频成片，现已上线。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://runwayml.com/news/introducing-runway-agent","text":"https://runwayml.com/news/introducing-runway-agent"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"9. "},{"tag":"text","text":"百度发布智能体产品矩阵，李彦宏提出日活智能体数新指标"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
百度 集中发布 DuMate 、 秒哒 3.0 等智能体矩阵。 李彦宏 提出日活智能体数将取代 Token 成新度量衡，官方称多款产品登顶基准测试。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://zhidx.com/p/557482.html","text":"https://zhidx.com/p/557482.html"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"技术与洞察"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"10. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenAI发文详解Codex在Windows上的专属沙箱构建方案"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
OpenAI 发布工程博文，详解了 Codex 在 Windows 上的专属沙箱机制。因原生沙箱不适配 Agent 运行，团队组合防火墙与权限控制等系统策略，强制隔离了文件读写与网络边界。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://openai.com/index/building-codex-windows-sandbox/","text":"https://openai.com/index/building-codex-windows-sandbox/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"11. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenAI发布财务团队使用Codex十大场景指南"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
OpenAI 发文展示了财务团队使用 Codex 的十大场景，该工具可将原始财务数据转化为月度审查报告等资产，全程无需编写代码。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://openai.com/academy/how-finance-teams-use-codex/","text":"https://openai.com/academy/how-finance-teams-use-codex/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"12. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Anthropic 发布 Claude 模型 computer use 和 browser use 最佳实践"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Claude 发布适用于 Claude 4.6 系列及 Opus 4.7 模型的 computer use 和 browser use 最佳实践指南，涵盖截图缩放、模型选择、思考参数与上下文管理。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://claude.com/blog/best-practices-for-computer-and-browser-use-with-claude","text":"https://claude.com/blog/best-practices-for-computer-and-browser-use-with-claude"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"13. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Claude Mythos 突破多项安全评估，日本三大银行将获防御性访问权限"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
最新测试显示， Claude Mythos Preview 突破了多项网络安全评估基准，在源代码审计与漏洞发现上表现优异。与此同时，日本三大银行及金融监管机构正组建防御联盟，即将获得该模型的访问权限以应对潜在威胁。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://www.aisi.gov.uk/blog/how-fast-is-autonomous-ai-cyber-capability-advancing","text":"https://www.aisi.gov.uk/blog/how-fast-is-autonomous-ai-cyber-capability-advancing"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"行业动态"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"14. "},{"tag":"text","text":"消息称 Anthropic 寻求超 9000 亿美元估值并拓展中小企业市场"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
据报道， Anthropic 宣布推出面向中小企业的 Claude for Small Business 服务，并在 Ramp 统计的商业客户数据中采用率首次反超 OpenAI 。同时消息称其正就以超 9000 亿美元估值募资至少 300 亿美元展开洽谈，并计划收购开发者工具初创公司 Stainless 。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://ramp.com/data/ai-index","text":"https://ramp.com/data/ai-index"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"15. "},{"tag":"text","text":"报道称前阿里千问负责人林俊旸创业，新公司估值据称约 20 亿美元"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
据报道，前 阿里 千问负责人 林俊旸 ，正在为新创立的 AI 实验室寻求数亿美元融资，据称融后估值可能达约 20 亿 美元。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/R5u-MxFUibH18tOUN0FEZA","text":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/R5u-MxFUibH18tOUN0FEZA"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"前瞻与传闻"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"16. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Warp 计划向免费用户开放 BYOK 功能"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Warp 官方称计划在未来 1-2 周 内，面向个人及 10 人 以下企业在免费计划中开放 BYOK 功能，并支持 OpenAI 兼容端点。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://github.com/warpdotdev/warp/issues/9288","text":"https://github.com/warpdotdev/warp/issues/9288"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"17. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Meta 推出基于 Muse Spark 的 Incognito Chat 隐私对话功能"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Meta 官宣 WhatsApp 和 Meta AI 推出 Incognito Chat，由 Muse Spark 模型在本地硬件安全区域处理，不留日志，未来数月上线。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://about.fb.com/news/2026/05/incognito-chat-whatsapp-meta-ai/","text":"https://about.fb.com/news/2026/05/incognito-chat-whatsapp-meta-ai/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Paper"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"1. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Senses Wide Shut: A Representation-Action Gap in Omnimodal LLMs"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-13"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
本文构建了包含500个电影片段的IMAVB基准，发现全模态大模型内部能感知文本与视听冲突却很少拒绝虚假前提，表现为“表征-行动鸿沟”，并提出探针引导逻辑调整(PGLA)方法，通过注入内部失配信号显著改善模型拒斥行为。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13737","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13737"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"2. "},{"tag":"text","text":"RTLC -- Research, Teach-to-Learn, Critique: A three-stage prompting paradigm inspired by the Feynman Learning Technique that lifts LLM-as-judge accuracy on JudgeBench with no fine-tuning"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-13"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
本文提出RTLC三阶段提示范式（研究、以教促学、批判），借鉴费曼学习法，无需微调即显著提升LLM作为评判者在JudgeBench-GPT上的准确率（Claude 3.7 Sonnet从64.6%提至78.6%），优于自一致性投票，为自动评估开放生成提供高性价比方案。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13695","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13695"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"3. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Negation Neglect: When models fail to learn negations in training"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-13"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
本文发现大模型微调时存在“否定忽视”现象：即使文档反复声明某主张为假，模型仍会将其学习为真，且该效应扩展至虚构标签和恶意行为，但通过将否定直接嵌入主张本身可部分缓解，提示微调数据中的句式结构至关重要。"}]]}

{"title":"Daily AI Info (2/2)","elements":[[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13829","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13829"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"4. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Neurosymbolic Auditing of Natural-Language Software Requirements"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-13"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
提出面向医疗设备软件需求的VERIMED神经符号审核管道：通过大型语言模型多次生成形式化逻辑，利用随机产生的翻译差异作为歧义信号，结合SMT求解器双向等价性检查检测不一致、空真和安全违规；在血液透析安全需求基准上，该方法将验证准确率从55.4%提升至98.5%，并通过反例修复有效减少歧义需求。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13817","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13817"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"5. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Good Agentic Friends Do Not Just Give Verbal Advice: They Can Update Your Weights"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-13"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
该论文提出TFlow框架，将发送方中间激活转化为接收方模型的低秩权重扰动进行高效通信，在多智能体协作任务上显著减少计算开销并保持准确性。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13839","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13839"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"6. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Uncertainty-Driven Anomaly Detection for Psychotic Relapse Using Smartwatches: Forecasting and Multi-Task Learning Fusion"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-13"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
针对精神疾病复发早期检测，利用智能手表采集的心脏、运动和睡眠数据，提出两种互补的异常检测框架：一种预测心脏动态并计算预测偏差，另一种通过多任务学习融合多模态信号并预测测量时序；两框架均使用Transformer编码器，并通过集成多层感知机估计预测不确定性以生成每日异常分数。采用晚期融合策略结合二者，在e-Prevention挑战赛数据集上取得相对获胜基线8%的提升，消融研究证实多模态融合的必要性。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13816","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13816"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"7. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Di-BiLPS: Denoising induced Bidirectional Latent-PDE-Solver under Sparse Observations"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-13"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
提出统一神经框架Di-BiLPS，结合变分自编码器压缩高维输入到潜空间、潜在扩散建模不确定性以及对比学习对齐表示，在潜空间高效求解正反问题，并通过基于保方差扩散的PDE去噪算法提升推理效率；在极稀疏观测（低至3%）的多个PDE基准上取得SOTA性能，并实现零样本超分辨率，大幅降低计算开销。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13790","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13790"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"8. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Harnessing Agentic Evolution"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-13"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
该论文提出AEvo框架，将智能体演化过程建模为交互环境，通过元智能体编辑控制未来演化的程序或智能体上下文，在多个基准上超越现有方法，为长周期搜索提供有效机制。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13821","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13821"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"9. "},{"tag":"text","text":"EVA-Bench: A New End-to-end Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-13"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
该论文提出EVA-Bench框架，通过模拟对话和复合指标EVA-A/EVA-X评估语音智能体的任务完成、语音保真和交互体验，覆盖口音和噪声扰动，为语音代理系统提供标准化评测工具。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13841","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13841"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"10. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Learning POMDP World Models from Observations with Language-Model Priors"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-13"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Pinductor方法利用语言模型作为先验，从少量观察-动作轨迹中迭代提出并优化部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）模型，在隐藏状态未知时匹配有监督方法的样本效率，并在序列图像分类任务上验证了可扩展性，旨在降低真实环境中智能体的交互成本。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13740","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13740"}]]}
